items.name_en: Factory-level Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag "Blue"
items.name_cn:
Factory-level Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag "Blue"
This Dior Groove 16 mini handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue calfskin, featuring a quilted oversized trellis pattern to elevate the style. Spacious compartment to hold various daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Zipper closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Size: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys, and lipstick

items.name_en: Factory leather with cashmere lining Lady Dior 3-Compartment Pearl Pink, the classic Diana bag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Exquisitely crafted with a visible quilting effect on the trellis pattern, the elegant and classic design is timeless. Adorned with a metallic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Mini style with a detachable chain shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, an ideal companion for evening wear. Detachable chain shoulder strap, can be paired with other embroidered straps as desired. Size: 17×15×7cm

items.name_en: Factory Grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag「Black」
items.name_cn:
Factory Grade Small Dior Jolie Bucket Bag「Black」
This Dior Jolie bucket bag is a new arrival from the Fall/Winter 2024 collection, showcasing a stylish look. Crafted from black calfskin, it features oversized houndstooth quilting and a drawstring closure, with a spacious interior. The small size is modern and chic, designed with a removable black leather top handle and an adjustable, removable chain shoulder strap made of vintage gold-finish metal CD links with resin bead embellishments. It can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or slung diagonally.
Drawstring closure
Interior slip pocket
Removable leather top handle
Vintage gold-finish metal CD chain with resin beads and adjustable leather strap
Size: 17 x 16 x 9 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: New Arrival Montaigne Collection💗30 AVENUE 💗
items.name_cn:
New Arrival Montaigne Collection💗30 AVENUE 💗
Crafted from blue Oblique fabric with refined rounded corners, featuring a vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the 30 Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel links in the same tone as the leather. The pleated design offers spacious storage and a refined silhouette, suitable for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
✨Small body, big capacity
🌟The CD connection on the chain is more exquisite
Size:22.5*12.5*6.5

items.name_en: Upgraded Version, Exclusive High-Quality Replica, Black
items.name_cn:
Upgraded Version, Exclusive High-Quality Replica, Black
Di0r Ultra-matte 🖤 SO BLACK
A dark-themed Diana bag
The hardware chain and handle are all textured matte black.
The all-black color scheme is versatile and elegant.
Perfect for daily commuting paired with a capable work outfit.
At the same time, the bag is not just low-key; it is also very versatile.
Pair it with cargo pants to transform into a dark style.
If you get tired of the all-black look, add a silk scarf to make it more romantic.
The leather is calfskin.
Compared to the sheepskin version, it is less prone to deformation and scratches.
Simply wipe it down after use.
It is a luxury bag that is not high-maintenance.
Size: 17cm

items.name_en: [Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Medium Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
items.name_cn:
[Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Medium Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
8806
Black Calfskin Oversized Wicker Weave
Number: M2836OSNW_
This Dior Toujours vertical bag is stylish, practical, and unique. Crafted from black calfskin and adorned with oversized wicker weave stitching, it features a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a fine leather drawstring closure for secure storage, along with a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the style. The medium size comes with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.
Main Material: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Double Opening: Fine drawstring and Christian Dior Paris drawstring with CD Lock clasp
D.I.O.R. Charm
Internal card slot
Top leather handle
Detachable leather shoulder strap
Includes dust bag
Size: 20 x 22 x 18.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 2 wallets, 1 phone, 2 card holders, sunglasses, and lipstick

items.name_en: [Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Small Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
items.name_cn:
[Highest Version, Factory Leather, Top-tier Original, Full Counter Packaging] Small Dior Toujours Vertical Bag
8805
Black Calfskin Oversized Wicker Weave
Number: M2820OSNW_M900
This Dior Toujours vertical bag is stylish, practical, and unique. Crafted from black calfskin and adorned with oversized wicker weave stitching, it features a spacious interior compartment for various daily essentials. It features a fine leather drawstring closure for secure storage, along with a CD Lock letter D turn-knob clasp that adjusts on both sides to elevate the style. The small size comes with a top leather handle and a detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing for hand-carry, shoulder, or crossbody wear.

. LTop Grade✨【carryall Handbag】 m13661 White Multicolour (Takashi Murakami)
The CarryAll Hl Lt small handbag features Monogram canvas and leather trim, serving as a companion for urban life. The ample silhouette features a tidy interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap.
